generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100Axis1 : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot system"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring torque for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from gearbox encoder for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) data trace for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque (τ) data trace for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SimulatedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CoulombViscousModel
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs with metadata for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcessService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcessService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for unified interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through model-based control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAdjustmentAction
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven digital twin evolution methodology: problem identification, asset/model analysis, simulation model creation, data identification, ongoing refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides DigitalTwinRefinementInsight
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification results used for control adjustments"
]

instance MotionAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot control parameters based on friction model"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models and robot motion"
]

instance DigitalTwinRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ongoing refinement of digital shadow reference model based on new data and analysis"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose-driven digital shadow structured per the Digital Shadow Reference Model, integrating physical sensors, data traces processed by simulation models, and visualization dashboard for friction analysis of the robot's first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, utilizing live operational data for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated vs. measured data to identify friction discrepancies, multi-physics-aware integration of white-box and black-box models for enhanced accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for modeling standards."
]
